backend/main.mo: Defines the main actor for Royal Academy with Marathi-language program data, academy metadata, and query methods to fetch all programs, filter by category, and retrieve academy info.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state (with 'courses' field) to new actor state (with 'programs' field), initializing new academy data with hardcoded Marathi strings.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—Marathi UI text updates and replacement of placeholder images—to their affected frontend component files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose within the Royal Academy Marathi-language police training site.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module for the Royal Academy site.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the single LandingPage view.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying Marathi academy description, a motivational quote, and a stats grid with metrics like student count, success rate, and years of experience.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact and footer section with Marathi labels for email, Instagram, and location contact cards, plus a footer with logo, copyright, and attribution text.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Gallery section displaying four police-training images in a grid with hover overlays and Marathi captions, plus a lightbox with prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section for a Marathi-language police training academy site, displaying a background image with overlay, academy name, tagline, and smooth-scroll CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a logo, scroll-aware background transition, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Programs.tsx: Displays a filterable grid of academy training programs fetched from the backend, with category icons, loading skeletons, and gold/navy styling.
frontend/src/components/SectionHeader.ts: Reusable decorative section header component rendering a title, optional subtitle, and gold ornamental dividers with light/dark color variants.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports two React Query hooks—useAcademyData and useAllPrograms—that fetch academy info and program listings from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Playfair Display and Lato fonts, defining Tailwind base/utilities, and declaring a deep-navy-and-gold OKLCH CSS custom property palette with dark mode variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Main landing page component that composes Navigation, Hero, About, Programs, Gallery, and Contact sections, fetching academy data and programs from the backend via custom hooks.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (navy, gold, cream, semantic UI colors), typography fonts (Playfair Display, Lato), border radius, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the academy site theme.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Royal Academy website build, including feature list, image requirements, architectural notes, and versioning for a Marathi-language police training academy site.
